title: Tone and tenor with lawyers should be moderate: J&K High Court tells trial judge
description: The Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh High Court recently observed that judges must exhibit a "moderation" in tone and tenor while dealing with the members of the Bar [Sanjay Kumar & Anr v Mohan Singh & Anr]Justice Rahul Bharti made the observation while expressing concern over the manner in which proceedings were conducted by a Katra court in a suit pertaining to a land dispute.“This Court would humbly remind the Presiding Officer of the court of Munsiff, Katra that proprietary of a judici
